title: Bootstrap
subTitle: Rapid front-end development with design consistency
overviewContent: I use Bootstrap to efficiently develop responsive web applications, particularly when I need rapid development or minimal design intervention. I rely on its pre-built components and flexible grid system for consistent layouts, and its predefined media queries for smooth adaptation across desktop, tablet, and mobile screens. I customise Bootstrap themes to align with project-specific requirements, producing interfaces that are both functional and visually coherent.
